calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-03-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Kris Case, CSR#13142. Telephone 25 998 0880. (514)

Ashwin V. Ladva, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Norberto Calvillo.
Declarations and exhibits submitted for default prove-up admitted in evidence.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) ASO-Steps of Rome, Inc.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $10,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $2,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $5,000.00
Costs: $443.25
Total Judgment in the amount of $17,443.25
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2013 Continued To Nov-13-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Prove-Up Hrg
Off Calendar Jul-31-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. rULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF NORBERTO CALVILLO'S Prove-Up hearing is Off calendar as to Department 302. The matter should be set in Department 514. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Melanie Gheno CSR#7489.
